title: Receipt
description: Evidence receipt produced by the source-verification skill / tools/research/capture.ts. One file per changed Score (or Event) lives at evidence/<git-short-sha>/<ISO3>-<indicator>-<year>.json (or event-<event-id>.json). Required in mode=real; ignored in mode=dummy. The receipt is the trajectory-eval (06) artifact — without it the score is unverified.

verify_via.description: Which URL eval 06 should re-fetch and re-hash to verify content_sha256. Default 'live' (the original source_url). Use 'wayback' for known-mutable sources (Wikipedia, news, social) where the live URL's hash changes frequently. With 'wayback', the receipt's content_sha256 reflects the immutable snapshot at wayback_url — verification is stable forever. See docs/decisions/0006-receipts-may-verify-via-wayback.md.
